description_long: This sculpture depicts the head of a young man with finely detailed, curly hair and intense, focused eyes. The facial features are highly realistic, with pronounced brows, a straight nose, and slightly parted lips, conveying a sense of alertness and contemplation. The hair is rendered in voluminous, intricate curls that frame the face and extend to the nape of the neck. The top of the head is flat and unfinished, suggesting the piece may be a fragment or a study rather than a complete bust. The surface has a stone-like appearance with subtle color variations, giving it a classical, weathered look. The base of the neck and lower portion are irregular and incomplete, further emphasizing its fragmentary nature.
description: A realistic, classical-style sculpted head of a young man with detailed curly hair and intense facial features, rendered in a stone-like material with a flat, unfinished top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the intense gaze, detailed facial features, and the full structure of the face and hairline.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile, the depth of the curls, and the pronounced brow and nose.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the intricate curls at the back of the head and the unfinished, flat top.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile, ear, and the layered curls extending toward the nape.
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
